title: clerodendrum hettae
intro: Clerodendrum hettae, also known as the Thai basil or Thai verbena, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum hettae include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant are made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create teas, or by using its essential oil to treat various health issues.
